seo.title: Care Staffing Agency in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Temporary and permanent care staffing across Greater London — support workers, healthcare assistants, night-shift and emergency cover for care homes and providers.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency in London
fields.sub: Temporary and permanent care staffing across Greater London — support workers, healthcare assistants, night-shift and emergency cover for care homes and providers.

image.alt: Healthcare assistant staffing team in London

fields.image_alt: Healthcare assistant staffing team in London

items.title: Support Workers
items.body: Our support workers help people live well day to day, assisting with personal care, mobility and daily routines in care homes, supported living and specialist settings.

items.title: Healthcare Assistants
items.body: Vetted healthcare assistants support clinical and personal care alongside your team, covering planned shifts and short-notice rota gaps alike.

items.title: Emergency Care Cover
items.body: When a shift falls through, we supply reliable short-notice cover so your residents are never left without the staff they depend on.

items.title: Night-Shift Care Staff
items.body: Experienced night-shift workers keep your service safe and settled overnight, from waking nights to sleep-in support.

items.title: Temporary Care Staff
items.body: Flexible temporary staff cover single shifts, block bookings and longer assignments while you recruit or manage absence.

items.title: Live-in Carers
items.body: Live-in carers provide continuous one-to-one support in a person's own home, matched carefully to their needs and routine.

fields.heading: Why choose Vigil Care Staffing
fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted, directly employed care workers to providers across Greater London. Every worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and referenced through a CQC-aligned recruitment process. We respond quickly to rota gaps, communicate clearly at every stage, and aim for consistent, familiar faces so your residents feel settled.

items.a: We supply care-sector workers to providers across Greater London, from Tower Hamlets and Hackney in the east to Hammersmith and Fulham in the west.

items.q: How quickly can you provide cover?
items.a: We hold a local pool of vetted workers and respond promptly to short-notice requests, including same-day cover where availability allows.
Every worker completes enhanced DBS checks, right-to-work verification and reference checks, with mandatory training in safeguarding and infection control.

items.q: Do you offer temporary and permanent staffing?
items.a: Yes. We provide temporary and short-notice cover as well as longer-term and permanent placements, depending on your needs.

fields.heading: Need care staff you can rely on?
fields.sub: Tell us the shifts you need covered and we will match vetted workers to your service.
